candidates.faers_interpretation: 44 FAERS reports mention both Grazoprevir and Hepatitis C-related terms (20.1% of all Grazoprevir reports). This suggests real-world clinical association.
candidates.signature_interpretation: Grazoprevir was not found among the top 42 drugs that reverse the Hepatitis C gene signature. Top reversers: AT-7519 (1.495), WZ-3105 (1.486), 6-[4-(3-chlorophenyl)piperazin-1-yl]-3-cyclohexylpyrimidine-2,4(1H,3H)-dione (1.473)
candidates.ai_hypothesis: of its unique mechanism of action and its favorable safety profile.
